rows.requirement: New -race test interleaves Append and Read goroutines on same fileID
rows.covered_by: TestContentAppendConcurrentRead: numWriters goroutines calling cs.Append, numReaders goroutines calling cs.Read, running concurrently on one shared fileID
parseContentChunks validates every Read() snapshot's byte structure (header length field, exact body bytes, footer) end-to-end; any torn/partial rename would produce an unparseable/truncated tail
Each reader iteration captures cat.Get(fileID).SizeBytes immediately before cs.Read and asserts len(content) is never smaller than that just-observed SizeBytes

rows.requirement: Test must be run/runnable via `go test ./engine/catalog/... -race -run TestContentAppendConcurrentRead`
rows.covered_by: Test function named exactly TestContentAppendConcurrentRead in package catalog

rows.requirement: No production code changes / scope isolation
No regression in existing engine/catalog tests
rows.covered_by: Full `go test ./engine/catalog/... -race` run after adding the new test
